title: InspectionResult
description: Schema for the output of the Inspection Middleware pipeline (Tier 2 of the Three-Tier Execution Pipeline). Every pipeline run produces an InspectionResult that records the approval verdict, any violations, invariant evaluation summaries, and NLP extraction anchors.

approved.description: True when the payload passed all inspection stages and is cleared for execution.

violations.description: Human-readable descriptions of schema, invariant, or NLP violations that occurred during inspection.

id.description: Invariant identifier from the domain physics definition.

passed.description: True when the invariant holds for the inspected payload.

severity.description: Severity level declared in the domain physics invariant definition.

invariant_summary.description: Per-invariant pass/fail results with severity, used for CTL audit logging.

key.description: Field name that the NLP extractor targets.

value.description: Extracted value from the NLP pre-processing stage.

nlp_anchors.description: Deterministic pre-LLM extractions that were merged into the payload.
